title: Incorrect query result caused by comparing decimal and float type value
poc: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t0(c0 DECIMAL);
SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0 <= - 0.8;
SELECT (t0.c0 <= - 0.8) IS TRUE AS flag FROM t0;
key_bug_features: Comparing decimal and float type value in queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1(c1 FLOAT, c2 DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 <= c2;
SELECT (c1 <= -0.8) IS TRUE AS flag FROM t1;
